# VentureCapsule

> Global online business, finance, and economics competition for students. Teams of 1–6 compete across 3 main rounds plus 1 bring-back round.

VentureCapsule lets students create, nurture, and execute solutions to real-world challenges across four pathways — Idea Lab, Portfolio Pathways, Intrapreneurship, and Case of Crisis — with professional mentoring and cash prizes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the competition and registration.
- [About](/about): What VentureCapsule is and who it's for.
- [Pathways](/subsections): The four competition tracks.
- [Structure](/structure): How the 3 main and 1 bring-back round work.
- [Timeline](/timeline): Key dates for the 2026 season.
- [Benefits](/benefits): Prizes, certificates, and mentoring on offer.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Eligibility, format, and participation questions.
- [Register](/register): Reserve your team's spot.
- [Apply](/apply): Submit your team application.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
